diagnosis: The player spent 90 seconds traversing a massive horizontal corridor (over 10,000px wide) with repetitive platform patterns and no vertical variety, then stalled completely at x≈7942 for the final 40+ seconds without progressing toward the exit at x≈9700. The trace shows consistent rightward movement at ~200px/sec through a flat, enemy-sparse environment, followed by total disengagement — no jumps, no backtracking, just idle waiting. This matches the 'horizontal grind' failure mode: the level is functionally completable but mechanically monotonous, causing the player to quit from boredom rather than difficulty.
